name: Mutual TLS
description: Require client certificates using mutual TLS (mTLS).

USE_MTLS.help: Enable client authentication with mutual TLS.
USE_MTLS.label: Use mutual TLS

MTLS_CA_CERTIFICATE_PRIORITY.help: Source of the client CA bundle: file path or base64/PEM data (file or data).
MTLS_CA_CERTIFICATE_PRIORITY.label: Client CA bundle priority

MTLS_CA_CERTIFICATE.help: Path to the trusted client CA bundle (PEM), readable by the Scheduler, which validates it, caches it, and distributes it to every instance (priority 'file'). Required when MTLS_VERIFY_CLIENT is set to on or optional.
MTLS_CA_CERTIFICATE.label: Client CA bundle

MTLS_CA_CERTIFICATE_DATA.help: Client CA bundle as base64 or plaintext PEM (priority 'data').
MTLS_CA_CERTIFICATE_DATA.label: Client CA bundle data (base64/plaintext)

MTLS_VERIFY_CLIENT.help: Client verification mode. 'on' requires a valid certificate, 'optional' lets requests through when no certificate is presented, and 'optional_no_ca' skips CA validation (diagnostics only, not real protection).
MTLS_VERIFY_CLIENT.label: Verify client mode

MTLS_URL.help: Regex matched against the request URI to require a valid client certificate only on matching paths (HTTP only). Set MTLS_VERIFY_CLIENT to optional so the handshake completes for non-matching paths; enforcement runs per-request in Lua. An invalid regex fails closed (matching requests are denied and logged) instead of being silently allowed. Use numbered slots for several paths (MTLS_URL_1, MTLS_URL_2). Leave empty to enforce mTLS on the whole site.
MTLS_URL.label: mTLS URL

MTLS_VERIFY_DEPTH.help: Maximum certificate chain depth accepted during client verification.
MTLS_VERIFY_DEPTH.label: Verify depth

MTLS_FORWARD_CLIENT_HEADERS.help: Forward verification results to upstream backends using X-SSL-Client-* headers.
MTLS_FORWARD_CLIENT_HEADERS.label: Forward client headers

MTLS_CRL.help: Optional path to a certificate revocation list (PEM), readable by the Scheduler, which validates it, caches it, and distributes it to every instance (priority 'file'). Leave empty to skip CRL checks.
MTLS_CRL.label: Client CRL path

MTLS_CRL_PRIORITY.help: Source of the CRL: file path or base64/PEM data (file or data).
MTLS_CRL_PRIORITY.label: Client CRL priority

MTLS_CRL_DATA.help: CRL as base64 or plaintext PEM (priority 'data').
MTLS_CRL_DATA.label: Client CRL data (base64/plaintext)
